## HydrationDiagnostic.formatStructuralError() method

Format a structural error encountered during the SSR DOM walk (e.g. attribute binding count overflow, missing close marker).

**Signature:**

```typescript
formatStructuralError(node: Node, hostName: string | undefined, expectedDescription: string): HydrationDiagnosticResult;
```
